Definition: The set of modalities for the images in the dataset, i.e., the type(s) of device, process or method that originally acquired or produced the data.
Usage note: The controlled vocabulary is defined by the subclasses of the range 'eucaim:ImagingModality' (eucaim:IMG1000009). This metadata field can be populated based on DICOM tag Modality (0008,0060) after mapping.

The controlled vocabulary is defined by the subclasses of the range 'eucaim:Manufacturer'' (eucaim:IMG1000010). DICOM tag Manufacturer (0008,0070) contains values in free text which have to be mapped first.

Definition: Anatomical areas captured in the images. See DICOM tag (0018, 0015) Body Part Examined.
Usage note: The controlled vocabulary is defined by the subclasses of the range 'eucaim:Body Structure'' (eucaim:BP1000024). DICOM tag Body Part Examined (0018,0015) contains values in free text or mapped to SNOMED-CT, which both would have to be mapped to the EUCAIM hyperontology.

Definition: ImagingSessionProtocol objects that describe the imaging data in the dataset.
